requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a (Isobutane) Flammability and Charge Limits (SANS IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a（异丁烷）可燃性及充注量限制（SANS IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a（異丁烷）可燃性及充注量限制（SANS IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: R-600a (isobutane) is widely used and accepted in household refrigerators supplied in South Africa as a low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant. Because R-600a is flammable (A3 classification), the appliance must meet the flammable-refrigerant safety provisions of SANS IEC 60335-2-24 (the South African adoption of IEC 60335-2-24), which set the maximum refrigerant charge for the appliance category, construction requirements to avoid ignition sources, ventilation and component requirements, and specific markings and warnings for handling, transport, and servicing. South Africa, as a party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, is also phasing down high-GWP HFCs, which reinforces hydrocarbon refrigerants. Evidence that the charge and safety construction comply with SANS IEC 60335-2-24 should be part of the NRCS Letter of Authority safety dossier, and flammable-refrigerant warning markings must be present on the appliance.
summary.zh: R-600a（异丁烷）作为低GWP碳氢制冷剂，在南非供应的家用电冰箱中被广泛使用和接受。由于R-600a可燃（A3类），器具须符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24（南非采纳IEC 60335-2-24）的可燃制冷剂安全条款，这些条款规定了该器具类别的最大制冷剂充注量、避免点火源的结构要求、通风和元件要求，以及搬运、运输和维修的特定标识和警告。南非作为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，亦在削减高GWP的HFC，这进一步推动碳氢制冷剂。充注量和安全结构符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24的证据应纳入NRCS许可函安全档案，器具上须有可燃制冷剂警告标识。
summary.zht: R-600a（異丁烷）作為低GWP碳氫製冷劑，在南非供應的家用電冰箱中被廣泛使用和接受。由於R-600a可燃（A3類），器具須符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24（南非採納IEC 60335-2-24）的可燃製冷劑安全條款，這些條款規定了該器具類別的最大製冷劑充注量、避免點火源的結構要求、通風和元件要求，以及搬運、運輸和維修的特定標識和警告。南非作為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，亦在削減高GWP的HFC，這進一步推動碳氫製冷劑。充注量和安全結構符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24的證據應納入NRCS許可函安全檔案，器具上須有可燃製冷劑警告標識。

standards_or_laws: SANS IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (flammable-refrigerant charge limits and construction)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — HFC phase-down obligations to which South Africa is a party (supports low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerants)
Compulsory Specification VC 9008 / NRCS LOA — safety dossier must evidence refrigerant safety compliance

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators using R-600a must comply with GB 4706.13 (the Chinese adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, particular requirements for refrigerating appliances), which similarly governs flammable-refrigerant charge limits, ignition-source avoidance, and markings, as part of the mandatory CCC certification. China is also a party to the Montreal Protocol/Kigali Amendment and is phasing down HFCs, and R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in Chinese domestic refrigerators. Because both GB 4706.13 and SANS IEC 60335-2-24 derive from the same IEC 60335-2-24 base standard, the technical charge limits and safety construction requirements are closely aligned. However, Chinese GB 4706.13 / CCC certification is issued under Chinese law and is not accepted in South Africa, where the equivalent evidence must support the NRCS LOA.
summary.zh: 在中国，使用R-600a的家用电冰箱须符合GB 4706.13（中国采纳IEC 60335-2-24，制冷器具特殊要求），该标准同样规定可燃制冷剂充注量限制、避免点火源及标识，并属于强制CCC认证的一部分。中国亦为《蒙特利尔议定书》／《基加利修正案》缔约方并在削减HFC，R-600a是中国境内冰箱的主流制冷剂。由于GB 4706.13和SANS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24基础标准，技术充注量限制和安全结构要求高度一致。但中国GB 4706.13／CCC认证依据中国法律签发，在南非不被接受，当地须以同等证据支撑NRCS许可函。
summary.zht: 在中國，使用R-600a的家用電冰箱須符合GB 4706.13（中國採納IEC 60335-2-24，製冷器具特殊要求），該標準同樣規定可燃製冷劑充注量限制、避免點火源及標識，並屬於強制CCC認證的一部分。中國亦為《蒙特利爾議定書》／《基加利修正案》締約方並在削減HFC，R-600a是中國境內冰箱的主流製冷劑。由於GB 4706.13和SANS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎標準，技術充注量限制和安全結構要求高度一致。但中國GB 4706.13／CCC認證依據中國法律簽發，在南非不被接受，當地須以同等證據支撐NRCS許可函。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerators, food freezers and ice-makers (IEC 60335-2-24 aligned; part of CCC)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — HFC phase-down obligations to which China is a party
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — covers refrigerant safety construction under GB 4706.13

gap.en: R-600a is the most favourable area for Chinese exporters because both markets accept it and both anchor on IEC 60335-2-24, but two points still require attention: (1) Acceptance of evidence — Chinese GB 4706.13 / CCC certification is not recognised in South Africa, so the refrigerant charge limit and flammable-refrigerant safety construction must be evidenced against SANS IEC 60335-2-24 within the NRCS LOA dossier; existing Chinese test reports may be leveraged but must be mapped/re-issued to the SANS standard. (2) Marking and documentation — the flammable-refrigerant warning markings, charge quantity, and servicing/handling instructions must comply with the SANS IEC 60335-2-24 marking clauses and be presented (in English) for the South African market. Although the underlying charge limits are technically aligned, the conformity-evidence and marking pathway is South Africa-specific.
gap.zh: R-600a是中国出口商最有利的领域，因为两个市场都接受它且均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础，但仍有两点须注意：（1）证据的接受——中国GB 4706.13／CCC认证在南非不被承认，故制冷剂充注量限制和可燃制冷剂安全结构须在NRCS许可函档案内按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供证据；现有中国检测报告可被采用，但须对应／重新出具至SANS标准。（2）标识和文件——可燃制冷剂警告标识、充注量及维修／搬运说明须符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24标识条款，并为南非市场提供（英文）。尽管基础充注量限制技术一致，合格证据和标识路径仍因南非而异。
gap.zht: R-600a是中國出口商最有利的領域，因為兩個市場都接受它且均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎，但仍有兩點須注意：（1）證據的接受——中國GB 4706.13／CCC認證在南非不被承認，故製冷劑充注量限制和可燃製冷劑安全結構須在NRCS許可函檔案內按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供證據；現有中國檢測報告可被採用，但須對應／重新出具至SANS標準。（2）標識和文件——可燃製冷劑警告標識、充注量及維修／搬運說明須符合SANS IEC 60335-2-24標識條款，並為南非市場提供（英文）。儘管基礎充注量限制技術一致，合格證據和標識路徑仍因南非而異。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits, safety construction, and markings under SANS IEC 60335-2-24 must be evidenced within the NRCS LOA; R-600a itself is accepted and supported by HFC phase-down
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — R-600a charge limits and flammable-refrigerant safety construction under GB 4706.13 are part of CCC certification; R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in China

source.publisher: NRCS — National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (South Africa)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is accepted in both China and South Africa and both anchor on IEC 60335-2-24, so the refrigerant choice is well-positioned. However, Chinese GB 4706.13 / CCC evidence is not recognised in South Africa — charge limits, safety construction, and flammable-refrigerant markings must be evidenced against SANS IEC 60335-2-24 within the NRCS LOA dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在中国和南非均被接受且两者均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础，故制冷剂选择具备良好条件。但中国GB 4706.13／CCC证据在南非不被承认——充注量限制、安全结构及可燃制冷剂标识须在NRCS许可函档案内按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在中國和南非均被接受且兩者均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎，故製冷劑選擇具備良好條件。但中國GB 4706.13／CCC證據在南非不被承認——充注量限制、安全結構及可燃製冷劑標識須在NRCS許可函檔案內按SANS IEC 60335-2-24提供證據。
